homepage.textContent: Skip to the content Call Us today210 82 54 443 EnglishΕλληνικά Same day results Laboratories Biopathological Hematological Molecular Biology Microbiology Laboratory Cytology Laboratory Test & Preparation Samples at home Online Appointment Menu Samples at home Home Sampling (Our laboratory allows you to perform any blood or molecular test you have neglected from the comfort of your home or work. Experienced blood recipients undertake the collection of blood and the collection of other biological samples from your personal space with a fast and reliable examination process. Special Needs Individuals People with disabilities are a special category of people for us, as they have to overcome the additional difficulties caused by the health problem they face, in order to move. They are treated with due care and respect, while special care is given to compliance of medical confidentiality. Our laboratory protects the rights of people wit disabilities and aims to facilitate them. EuLab is located on the ground floor with easy access for people with mobility problems. A 50% discount is provided on all exams. Medical Lab Tositsa 13, Eksarcheia Athina +30 210 82 54 443 [email protected] Medical Lab Veikoy 72, Koukaki, Athens +30 210 92 47 346 [email protected] Online Appointment Make your next appointment online USEFUL LINKSData Protection Policy Privacy Policy Cookies Newsletter Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.Email *Accept Terms *I have read the terms of use and privacy policy and agree to allow my data to be used for this communication.Submit EU Lab 2022 © All rights reserved. Absolutely necessary cookies These are 'first-party cookies' used exclusively by us for the proper and secure operation of our website. They allow you to browse and respond to your actions/requests when using the features of our website, such as accessing secure areas and providing protection against any malicious activity, etc. The connection and browsing program information and settings stored in the cookies are reproduced on our websites and cannot identify your individual identity. Without them, many applications of our website cannot function effectively. //# sourceURL=perfmatters-lazy-load-js-before var moove_frontend_gdpr_scripts = {"ajaxurl":"https://eulab.gr/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php","post_id":"14","plugin_dir":"https://eulab.gr/wp-content/plugins/gdpr-cookie-compliance","show_icons":"all","is_page":"1","ajax_cookie_removal":"false","strict_init":"2","enabled_default":{"strict":2,"third_party":0,"advanced":0,"performance":0,"preference":0},"geo_location":"false","force_reload":"false","is_single":"","hide_save_btn":"false","current_user":"0","cookie_expiration":"365","script_delay":"2000","close_btn_action":"1","close_btn_rdr":"","scripts_defined":"{\"cache\":true,\"header\":\"\",\"body\":\"\",\"footer\":\"\",\"thirdparty\":{\"header\":\"\",\"body\":\"\",\"footer\":\"\"},\"strict\":{\"header\":\"\",\"body\":\"\",\"footer\":\"\"},\"advanced\":{\"header\":\"\",\"body\":\"\",\"footer\":\"\"}}","gdpr_scor":"true","wp_lang":"_el","wp_consent_api":"false","gdpr_nonce":"6e20f6ff8d"}; //# sourceURL=moove_gdpr_frontend-js-extra var gdpr_consent__strict = "true" var gdpr_consent__thirdparty = "false" var gdpr_consent__advanced = "false" var gdpr_consent__performance = "false" var gdpr_consent__preference = "false" var gdpr_consent__cookies = "strict" //# sourceURL=moove_gdpr_frontend-js-after Κλείσιμο Ρυθμίσεων Cookie GDPR Επισκόπηση απορρήτου Απολύτως απαραίτητα cookies Στατιστικά Marketing Πολιτική Cookies Επισκόπηση απορρήτου Αυτός ο ιστότοπος χρησιμοποιεί cookies για να σας παρέχουμε την καλύτερη δυνατή εμπειρία χρήστη. Οι πληροφορίες των cookies αποθηκεύονται στο πρόγραμμα περιήγησής σας και εκτελούν λειτουργίες όπως η αναγνώρισή σας όταν επιστρέφετε στον ιστότοπό μας και βοηθώντας την ομάδα μας να καταλάβει ποια τμήματα του ιστότοπου μας θεωρείτε πιο ενδιαφέροντα και χρήσιμα. Απολύτως απαραίτητα cookies Το αυστηρώς απαραίτητο cookie θα πρέπει να είναι ενεργοποιημένο ανά πάσα στιγμή, ώστε να μπορέσουμε να αποθηκεύσουμε τις προτιμήσεις σας για ρυθμίσεις cookie. Ενεργοποίηση ή απενεργοποίηση των Cookies Ενεργοποιημένο Απενεργοποιημένο Στατιστικά Αυτός ο ιστότοπος χρησιμοποιεί το Google Analytics για τη συλλογή ανώνυμων πληροφοριών, όπως τον αριθμό επισκεπτών στον ιστότοπο και τις πιο δημοφιλείς σελίδες. Η διατήρηση αυτού του cookie μας επιτρέπει να βελτιώσουμε τον ιστότοπό μας.
